since_last: 60% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.22%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.50% · BTC -3.21% · Gold +0.53% · Nasdaq100 +1.22%. 60% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.22%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.22%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.61%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +19.94%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +19.94%, AVAV +15.57%, VRT +7.32%, MRVL +6.71%, CEVA +6.69%. Laggards: DLR -4.97%, SMR -4.63%, TTD -4.58%, HON -4.00%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.90% at $170.59
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.90% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
